best_bet.reason: The warmest water of the three counties (around 80 degrees) paired with slightly larger 2-foot waves makes this the sweet spot for both swimmers and anyone looking for a little more action in the water.

counties.name: New Hanover County
counties.beaches: Wrightsville Beach · Carolina Beach · Kure Beach

counties.name: Brunswick County
counties.beaches: Oak Island · Holden Beach · Ocean Isle Beach · Sunset Beach
